persistenceMechanism: none; pure static factory/evaluator methods return records and decisions to caller
tenancy: record fields include caseId and organisationId; no store-level tenancy enforcement because there is no store
consent: explicit consent gates are encoded in eligibility/promotion methods
deletion: none because no persistence is performed
encryption: hashing only for submitted content and actor hash; no encryption because no payload is stored
rawTextHandling: submittedContent is hashed; sanitizedPreview can contain caller-supplied preview truncated in audit entries
restartBehaviour: all returned objects are caller-owned; bridge itself has no state to survive restart
authorityDecision: Do not wire. It is a policy helper, not authoritative memory.
redisGuardrailsIfLaterIntroduced: Redis stores no unique decision truth
cache loss cannot lose canonical graph
dual-write success is never required for durable acknowledgement
